basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 02 March 2026 on the official website of IIT Hyderabad. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering/Artificial Intelligence/Mathematics and Computing/ECE
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering/Artificial Intelligence/Mathematics and Computing/ECE (or any related discipline) with at least 70% marks. Fluency in English writing and technical communication.

selection_process: academic record and relevant experience Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_hyderabad: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering/Artificial Intelligence/Mathematics and Computing/ECE

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Hyderabad Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering/Artificial Intelligence/Mathematics and Computing/ECE (or any related discipline) with at least 70% marks. Fluency in English writing and technical communication.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on eligibility criteria, academic record and relevant experience Online Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate (RA) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate (RA) position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Mathematics and Computing, ECE, or a related discipline with at least 70% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Research Associate (RA) posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate (RA) posts is 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate (RA) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate (RA) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Research Associate (RA) position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these positions?
faq.answer: The application process is via Email.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Associate (RA) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on eligibility and academic record, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
